scripts.test: pnpm build && node --experimental-strip-types --env-file=.env --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/try-it-out-helpers.test.mjs tests/frontend-fsd-boundaries.test.mjs tests/frontend-test-workflow-editor.test.mjs tests/bullmq-job-id-contract.test.mjs tests/test-workflow-worker-wiring.test.mjs tests/test-workflow-error-codes.test.mjs tests/schema-contract.test.mjs tests/versions-endpoint.test.mjs tests/diff-engine.test.mjs tests/versions-worker-diff.test.mjs tests/search-indexing.test.mjs tests/try-it-out-proxy.test.mjs tests/webhook-dispatcher.test.mjs tests/api-token-auth.test.mjs tests/job-status-endpoint.test.mjs tests/member-management-endpoint.test.mjs tests/backend-github-oauth.test.mjs tests/backend-oidc.test.mjs tests/github-action.test.mjs tests/github-action-oidc.test.mjs tests/frontend-doc-portal.test.mjs tests/frontend-auth.test.mjs tests/frontend-dashboard.test.mjs tests/cli-deploy.test.mjs tests/cli-catalog.test.mjs tests/invites-endpoint.test.mjs tests/webhooks-endpoint.test.mjs tests/production-adapters-workers.test.mjs tests/github-integration.test.mjs
scripts.build: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://bumd:bumd@localhost:5436/bumd prisma validate --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -b && pnpm --filter @bumd/frontend build
